policy: Non-mutating Vanderbilt candidate review-queue approval request. It asks whether verified candidate fingerprints, linked-route scope metadata, and route recourse rows may become review queues. It does not approve person ingestion, parser output as accepted people, training-state mutation, denominator closure, Vanderbilt school verification, URL rewrite, unsupported-label ingestion, enrichment acceptance, raw dump publication, or unique-person identity collapse.
required_approval_line: APPROVE vanderbilt_candidate_review_queue_materialization_approved APPROVAL_ROWS 159 CANDIDATE_QUEUE_ROWS 155 SCOPE_QUEUE_ROWS 3 RECOURSE_QUEUE_ROWS 1 SOURCE_ROWSET_SHA256 2740184f00379fd6b1885632ac13faec45ff96bfbf0a70130aa712e5966612ba VERIFICATION_ROWSET_SHA256 918556f5b5a33b5d8e7181ed6654a9b7773b8c8a24f09f9a23b06c7157d39fe2 ROWSET_SHA256 a62defd685b64560a138cfaeb82956254f49341ce982bb549fe1846b25dd5bd5
